report.summary: Cycle-close v18: No new commits since v17 — git index.lock still blocking deploy pipeline (~12h). 528 unique published slugs, 2 queue items ready. 142 TS errors unchanged (5 files). 21 modified + 84 untracked files pending.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 528 unique published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (545 total entries with duplicates), 103 legacy slugs still missing page.tsx — unchanged from v17
2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items: crypto-on-ramps-off-ramps-guide-2026, crypto-portfolio-allocation-guide-2026 — both have page.tsx, ready to promote
TypeScript errors: 142 across 5 files (unchanged from v17) — lido-v3-stvaults (bulk), structured-data.examples.ts, crypto-arbitrage, crypto-index-funds, institutional-crypto-adoption
No new page regressions introduced this cycle — delta is zero from v17
Live site HTTP checks not possible (egress blocked from sandbox); local file audits stable
255 learn guide directories in src/app/learn/

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API route files present: prices (60s TTL), trending (300s), fear-greed (600s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (configurable)
No API route code changes since last cycle — all stable since Mar 14
All routes have in-memory cache + stale-while-revalidate + fallback data pattern
Rate limiter still only wired into /api/health — 0/6 core routes protected (carry-over P1)
CoinGecko free tier still in use — no API key configured, rate limit risk unmitigated
Cannot verify live API responses due to egress block — no data freshness check possible this cycle

sections.title: DevOps
items: BLOCKER: .git/index.lock persists (~12+ hours, created 09:58 UTC) — blocking all git operations
Latest deployed commit: 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages) — no new deploy this cycle
Working tree: 21 modified files + 84 untracked files = 105 total pending changes
Modified files include: published-pages.ts, globals.css, NotificationCenter.tsx, WhaleAlertFeed.tsx, 6 learn page fixes, 5 OG SVG updates
529 insertions, 458 deletions pending across 21 modified files
next.config.ts: ignoreBuildErrors=true continues to shield Vercel from 142 TS errors
ACTION NEEDED: rm .git/index.lock → stage files → commit → push to trigger Vercel deploy

sections.title: Project Manager
items: No new code shipped this cycle — blocked by git index.lock (carry-over from v17)
